g.text: A collection of utilities for ML research
Interactive chat with document content using LLMs
Enrich bibtex file entries with publication information
Manage local experiment files with Git-based versioning and lineage tracking
Forward port to a Kubernetes pod with a specific name pattern.
Check and improve LaTeX grammar and style with LLM
Download all pdfs from openreview venue
Build searchable index of PDF documents
Download artifacts and runs from Weights & Biases
for more information about a specific tool.
